valentines.notes: Valentine's couples upgrade. Push on both posting days in the week.

mothers_day.notes: Mother's Day spa experience (Spa) and gift voucher push (Aesthetics).

summer_prep.notes: Summer confidence messaging. Aesthetics: treatment prep. Slimming: body confidence (never shame-based).

christmas.notes: Gift voucher push across Spa and Aesthetics. Include delivery deadline messaging.

new_year.notes: New year fresh start messaging. Aesthetics: new client consultation. Slimming: compassionate restart.

festa_season.notes: Malta festa season. Use Maltese language touches, reference village festas and local traditions.

carisma_spa.notes: Post once, copy to all 5 locations. Rotate which location is mentioned first in copy.

carisma_aesthetics.compliance_extra: Never reference before/after. Always include 'from' with pricing. Consultation-first messaging.
carisma_aesthetics.notes: Single location. Higher compliance bar for medical claims.

carisma_slimming.compliance_extra: Never use shame language. Always validate before offering. Use 'may help' not 'will'. Doctor-led authority.
carisma_slimming.notes: Single location. Highest sensitivity bar across all brands.

_metadata.notes: Content calendar for GBP posting system. Seasonal overrides take priority over default rotation.
